settings.problem_title: Most Health Products Are Full of Hidden Chemicals
settings.problem_description: The market is flooded with supplements and health products that promise results but deliver artificial fillers, synthetic additives, and questionable ingredients. Your body deserves better.
settings.solution_description: Every Laushe product is crafted from ethically sourced, natural ingredients with complete transparency. Our Sunnah-blessed formulations combine ancient wisdom with modern quality standards.

settings.text: Full ingredient transparency on every product

settings.section_subtitle: Here is what our customers report after 3 months of using Laushe products.

settings.subtitle: Our Story
settings.title: Rooted in Tradition, Crafted with Love
settings.description_1: Laushe was born from a simple belief: that the best health solutions come from nature itself. Founded by Zahra, a passionate advocate for natural wellness, every product in our collection is a tribute to the healing traditions passed down through generations.
settings.description_2: We source our ingredients directly from trusted farms, ensuring every product meets the highest standards of purity and potency. Our Sunnah-blessed formulations combine prophetic medicine with modern nutritional science.

settings.quote: Laushe has completely transformed my performance and recovery. I trust these natural products.
settings.body: After incorporating Laushe into my daily routine, I noticed a dramatic improvement in my energy levels, mental focus, and overall wellbeing. This is the only brand I trust for natural performance nutrition.
settings.name: Arshad Nadeem
settings.title: Pakistan's Olympic Gold Medalist
settings.disclaimer: Individual results may vary. Testimonial reflects the personal experience of the individual.

settings.question: What are the key ingredients?
settings.answer: Our formula contains 100% organic, naturally sourced ingredients including premium Desi Ghee, Kashmiri Honey, Black Seed Oil, and other Sunnah-blessed herbs. Every ingredient is traceable to its source.

settings.question: When can I expect results?
settings.answer: Most customers report feeling an improvement in energy and digestion within 3-5 days. Full benefits including sustained energy and improved immunity typically emerge after 3 weeks of consistent use.

settings.question: Are all your products 100% natural?
settings.answer: Yes! Every Laushe product is crafted with 100% natural, organic ingredients. We have zero artificial additives, preservatives, or synthetic fillers. What you see on the label is exactly what's inside.

settings.question: Do you offer a money-back guarantee?
settings.answer: Absolutely. We offer a 30-day risk-free trial. If you are not completely satisfied with your results, contact us and we will provide a full refund — no questions asked.

settings.question: Do you ship across Pakistan?
settings.answer: Yes, we deliver across all major cities in Pakistan including Lahore, Karachi, Islamabad, Rawalpindi, and more. Free shipping is available on qualifying orders.
